body:
Release prepared and pushed. Branch release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests has been updated with a small fix to make the scraper integration test pass. I do not have a GitHub token in this environment to create the PR automatically.

Suggested PR title: chore(scraper): fix integration test by adding safeReplace and validate helpers

Suggested PR body summary:
- Added packages/scraper/src/safeReplace.js to perform atomic writes with timestamped backups.
- Added packages/scraper/src/validate.js to validate scraper output (AJV if available, fallback checks otherwise).
- Verified scraper integration test passes locally (see test output).

Verification performed: ran packages/scraper integration test which executes scraper.run() and asserts backup creation on second run; test passed. Commit: 4c40413.

Create the PR via GitHub UI: https://github.com/AI-LLM-World/AI-Tools-Library/compare/main...release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests
Or run locally with gh CLI:
  gh pr create --base main --head release/gsta-51/ci-smoke-tests --title "chore(scraper): fix integration test by adding safeReplace and validate helpers" --body "See summary in issue comments."

If you want me to open the PR, provide a GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the environment and I will create it now.
